title: Production outage (3.5h)
description: Kubernetes node group scaling misconfiguration caused API saturation and service unavailability.

title: Vendor settlement delays
description: Third-party processor SLA breach delayed 18 customer payouts by 24-48 hours.

title: Overly broad S3 IAM policy
description: Audit discovered S3 bucket with wildcard access from an internal role; no evidence of exfiltration.

title: AR aging spike
description: Accounts receivable >90 days rose to 13% due to invoicing cycle changes during ERP migration.

title: Data retention deviation (near miss)
description: Old event logs retained beyond policy due to disabled lifecycle rule; purged after discovery.

title: Negative social media spike
description: Public complaints during outage led to 36 negative posts and 2 industry blog mentions.

title: Phishing simulation 12% CTR
description: Company-wide phishing exercise saw 12% click rate and 4 credential submissions.

title: Senior Staff Engineer resignation
description: Lead for reconciliation service left with 2 weeks' notice; knowledge transfer partial.

title: SOC 2 evidence gaps
description: Change management tickets lacked peer review evidence for 3 of 25 samples.

title: Capacity near miss on load test
description: Pre-release load test showed queue depth spikes; autoscaling threshold too high.

title: DORA regulation readiness gap
description: EU DORA scoping indicated gaps in third-party concentration mapping and ICT testing cadence.

title: Top client expansion delayed
description: Delayed upsell with top-3 client due to missing feature parity in EU tax treatment.
